EmailTemplate.name: Annual Meeting Event Notice One
EmailTemplate.subject: 欢迎来青参加2025年度营销会议 Welcome to Qingdao for the 2025 Annual Marketing Meeting
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c}, 欢迎来青参加2025年度营销会议。青岛天气多云间晴，气温-2至9度。 青岛海天金融中心酒店地址：崂山区仙霞岭路29号。 18、19日10点-20点将有工作人员在酒店大堂协助办理入住并发放参会证。
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c},
Welcome to Qingdao for the 2025 Annual Marketing Meeting. The weather is sunny, -2 to 9 °C.
Qingdao Haitian Financial Center Hotel address: 29 Xianxialing Road, Laoshan District.
On 18 & 19, from 10:00 to 20:00, staff will be in the hotel lobby to assist check-in.
